3265770.name: Evernoth A Deep Descent
3265770.description:
Hide and Seek is a 3D psychological horror game that lets you explore interconnected mysteries inside a haunted family home filled with dark secrets. You’ll investigate, hide, and fight—with swordplay, magic, and your fists—while uncovering clues and facing intrusions from other realities that bleed into the house.

As Emil, raised by his grandmother, you move through the herb shop, the greenhouse, the backyard labyrinth, and upstairs rooms heavy with family history. Each episode opens a new layer of the past and brief oneiric crossings through the Veil. Solve tactile, emotional puzzles and piece together fragmented memories to reveal what the house refuses to say out loud.

Evernoth and Seek unfolds episodically inside a single, lived-in home. Explore familiar corridors, slip into dreamlike spaces, and face duel-like encounters using blade work, spells, and hand-to-hand combat. Each chapter ties a room, a bond, and a wound—connecting clues across the house as the larger Evernoth mystery threads through its walls.Hide and Seek is a 3D psychological horror game that lets you explore interconnected mysteries inside a haunted family home filled with dark secrets. You’ll investigate, hide, and fight—with swordplay, ritual magic, and bare-knuckle combat—while uncovering clues and facing intrusions from other realities that bleed into the house.

As Emil, a teenager raised by his grandmother, you embark on an episodic journey through the herb shop, the greenhouse, the backyard labyrinth, and the upstairs rooms heavy with family history. Each episode opens a new layer of the past and oneiric crossings through the Veil. You’ll solve emotional, tactile puzzles and piece together fragmented memories to reveal what the house refuses to say out loud.

Prepare to confront not only what stalks you—the cursed doll and beasts from elsewhere—but also the psychological depths of trauma and fear. Will you uncover the truths binding these stories, or be consumed by the mysteries you seek to unravel?

  •
3265770.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 加泰罗尼亚语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
